Issues: The design is extremely simplistic and generic, which limits its commercial appeal.
The execution, while clean, lacks the unique artistic vision or high technical complexity often required for high-value graphic design sales.
The concept (a basic stylized building) is widely used in the digital art space, making it difficult to establish strong, unique IP.
The quality of line work and color blending, while functional, does not meet the standards for premium commercial printing or merchandise.
